headline: Analyst Reduces T Rowe Price Group Target (TROW) to $99
summary: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TROW) is included among the 13 Undervalued Dividend Aristocrats to Buy Now. T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TROW) is a publicly owned investment manager. The firm provides its services to individuals, institutional investors, retirement plans, financial intermediaries, and institutions. On March 6, Evercore ISI lowered its price target on T. […]

headline: Is T. Rowe Price (TROW) Offering An Opportunity After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether T. Rowe Price Group is offering good value right now, a key question is whether its current share price lines up with the fundamentals you care about. The stock recently closed at US$89.33, with a 2.9% decline over 7 days, a 6.8% decline over 30 days, a 14.6% decline year to date and a 0.8% return over 1 year, which may signal changing views on both its growth potential and risk. Recent news flow around asset managers has focused on shifting investor preferences...
